description: Read-only permission set for viewer (pop-out session detail) windows. Phase 1A.1 of the tech-debt plan: before this split, viewer-* windows inherited the main capability and could invoke destructive commands (factory_reset, save_config, sdk_send_message, launch_session, skills_*, mcp_*, task_*, etc.). This capability whitelists only the read-only session-viewing commands actually reached from ChildApp.vue → SessionDetailTabView.vue → tab components. Intentionally missing: dialog, opener, process, updater, notification, and any tracepilot write/launch/delete/sdk/mcp/skills/task command. See docs/adr/0002-tauri-capability-scoping.md.
